news.title: Mother Knows Best, Even in College
news.summary_en: A Saint Louis University first-year seminar offers the mother lode of real-world lessons and future-facing skills.

news.title: SLU Political Science Major Appointed to New Aspen Institute Advisory Group
news.summary_en: Saint Louis University political science major Faith Townsell has been appointed to the Aspen Institute's Rising Generations Strategy Group, a national advisory body within the Institute's Education & Society Program. Rising Generations Strategy Group is a new initiative designed to shape a bold, shared vision for the future of American education.
